sentences.en: The NCAA ruled Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby was ineligible after placing more than $90,000 in bets on college sports, and that includes 40 bets on his own team when he played at Indiana.
sentences.cn: NCAA裁定德克萨斯理工大学四分卫布伦丹·索斯比在大学生体育赛事上投注超过9万美元后无参赛资格，其中包括他在印第安纳大学效力时对自己球队的40次投注。
sentences.structure: 主句（The NCAA ruled）+ 宾语从句（Texas Tech quarterback...was ineligible）+ 时间状语（after placing...）+ 并列结构（and that includes...）
sentences.analysis: ruled后接省略that的宾语从句；placing是动名词作介词after的宾语；that指代前文的bets。

sentences.en: Now, a federal judge has overruled all of that, the judge, conveniently based in Texas Tech's hometown of Lubbock, argued that Sorsby will suffer, quote, 'probable, imminent and irreparable injury' if he's not able to play for the Red Raiders this year.
sentences.cn: 现在，一名联邦法官否决了所有这些，这位法官恰好在德克萨斯理工大学所在地拉伯克，他认为索斯比如果不能在今年为红色突击者队效力，将遭受“可能的、迫在眉睫的、不可挽回的伤害”。
sentences.structure: 主句（a federal judge has overruled...）+ 同位语（the judge...）+ 谓语（argued）+ 宾语从句（that Sorsby will suffer...）+ 条件状语从句（if he's not able to play...）
sentences.analysis: conveniently based...是过去分词短语作定语修饰the judge；quote用于引出直接引语。

sentences.en: The chairman of the NCAA calls the decision a glaring integrity threat, he wants Congress to pass a new bill which would allow them to enforce their gambling restrictions, adding, quote, 'It's needed now more than ever.'
sentences.cn: NCAA主席称这一决定是对诚信的明显威胁，他希望国会通过一项新法案，允许他们执行赌博限制，并补充说，“现在比以往任何时候都更需要它。”
sentences.structure: 并列句（The chairman...calls...he wants...）+ 定语从句（which would allow...）+ 现在分词短语（adding...）
sentences.analysis: calls the decision a glaring integrity threat是“动词+宾语+宾语补足语”结构；which引导定语从句修饰bill；adding是现在分词作伴随状语。

sentences.en: I think what President Trump is asking, I think is more impartial to or more partial to the fact that Kalshi and Polymarket have things that are outside of sports offering.
sentences.cn: 我认为特朗普总统所要求的，更多的是对Kalshi和Polymarket提供体育之外的东西这一事实的公正或偏袒。
sentences.structure: 主句（I think）+ 宾语从句（what President Trump is asking...is more impartial...）+ 同位语从句（the fact that...）
sentences.analysis: what引导主语从句；that引导同位语从句修饰fact；that are outside of sports offering是定语从句修饰things。

sentences.en: If you can bet on some of those things, like who's to say that doesn't leak and compromise an operation?
sentences.cn: 如果你能赌其中一些事情，比如谁能说这不会泄露并危及行动呢？
sentences.structure: 条件状语从句（If you can bet...）+ 主句（who's to say...）+ 宾语从句（that doesn't leak...）
sentences.analysis: who's to say是固定表达，意为“谁能说”；that指代前文提到的信息泄露的可能性。

sentences.en: He doesn't want to be known as the president who had insider trading at all of these different things that were going on that were a result of him.
sentences.cn: 他不想被称为那个在所有因他而起的不同事情上进行内幕交易的总统。
sentences.structure: 主句（He doesn't want to be known as the president）+ 定语从句（who had insider trading...）+ 定语从句（that were going on）+ 定语从句（that were a result of him）
sentences.analysis: 三个that引导的定语从句层层修饰：第一个修饰things，第二个修饰things，第三个修饰things。

sentences.en: Platner is seeking to overcome a wave of scandal, including claims of knowingly getting a Nazi tattoo and allegations of inappropriate behavior with past girlfriends, all of which he has denied.
sentences.cn: 普拉特纳正试图克服一波丑闻，包括明知故犯地纹纳粹纹身以及与前女友不当行为的指控，所有这些他都否认了。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + 同位语（including...） + 定语从句（all of which...）
sentences.analysis: 主句为Platner is seeking to overcome a wave of scandal，后接including引导的短语作同位语，列举丑闻内容，最后all of which引导非限制性定语从句修饰claims和allegations。

sentences.en: Part of our thesis here is that people do not want their candidates grown in vats; they want people who are real human beings, and they want people who do not look and sound like the vat-grown people who have been leading this country off a cliff for the last century.
sentences.cn: 我们的论点之一是，人们不希望他们的候选人是人工培养出来的；他们想要真实的人，他们想要那些看起来和听起来都不像上个世纪一直把这个国家引向悬崖的人工培养的人。
sentences.structure: 主系表 + 表语从句（that...） + 并列句（they want...）
sentences.analysis: 主句为Part of our thesis here is that...，that引导表语从句，从句中包含两个并列分句，第二个分句中包含两个who引导的定语从句修饰people。

sentences.en: I get and understand the frustration of going through the party filter sometimes, but there's a level of quality checks that, when you go through that process, you understand what you are getting in the end, instead of this wild card now.
sentences.cn: 我理解有时通过政党筛选的挫败感，但有一定程度的质量检查，当你经历那个过程时，你最终会明白你得到的是什么，而不是现在这种未知数。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + but连接并列句 + that引导定语从句 + when引导时间状语从句
sentences.analysis: 主句为I get and understand the frustration，but后为并列句，其中that引导定语从句修饰quality checks，从句中嵌套when引导的时间状语从句。

sentences.en: And it's a shame that, you know, the chattering class was all in for someone who has all these flaws, and we knew it from the start.
sentences.cn: 遗憾的是，你知道，舆论界全力支持一个有这样那样缺点的人，而我们从一开始就知道。
sentences.structure: 主系表 + that引导主语从句 + who引导定语从句
sentences.analysis: 主句为It's a shame，that引导主语从句，从句中who引导定语从句修饰someone。

sentences.en: California's elections often take days to get resolved because postmarked mail-in ballots, received up to a week after election day, can still be counted, again, as long as they are postmarked on election day.
sentences.cn: 加州的选举通常需要几天才能有结果，因为盖有邮戳的邮寄选票，在选举日后一周内收到，仍可计入，只要它们在选举日当天盖有邮戳。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + because引导原因状语从句 + as long as引导条件状语从句
sentences.analysis: 主句为California's elections often take days to get resolved，because引导原因状语从句，从句中嵌套as long as引导的条件状语从句。

sentences.en: I think it's interesting that he is relitigating some of these issues direct into the lifeblood of the media ecosystem on the right.
sentences.cn: 我认为有趣的是，他正在重新争论其中一些问题，直接触及右翼媒体生态系统的命脉。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + that引导宾语从句
sentences.analysis: 主句为I think，后接省略that的宾语从句，从句中it为形式主语，真正主语为that引导的从句。

sentences.en: And it's very reminiscent of when Charlie Sheen had said, if there are drugs in the house I'm going to find them.
sentences.cn: 这让人想起查理·辛曾说过的话：如果房子里有毒品，我会找到它们。
sentences.structure: 主系表 + of介词短语 + when引导宾语从句 + if引导条件状语从句
sentences.analysis: 主句为It's very reminiscent of...，of后接when引导的宾语从句，从句中嵌套if引导的条件状语从句。

sentences.en: And this concert was fascinating because they went from the Revolutionary War to the present, kind of decade by decade.
sentences.cn: 这场音乐会非常吸引人，因为他们从独立战争一直演到现在，差不多每十年一个阶段。
sentences.structure: 主系表 + because引导原因状语从句
sentences.analysis: 主句为this concert was fascinating，because引导原因状语从句。

sentences.en: And this next week you will see the committee of five appointed on June 11th Thursday, which is when Thomas Jefferson was assigned to write the Declaration of Independence.
sentences.cn: 下周你将看到6月11日星期四任命的五人委员会，正是托马斯·杰斐逊被指派撰写《独立宣言》的时候。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + which引导非限制性定语从句 + when引导表语从句
sentences.analysis: 主句为you will see the committee of five，which引导非限制性定语从句修饰committee，从句中when引导表语从句。

sentences.en: And all of us have done something like that, something where we —
sentences.cn: 我们所有人都做过类似的事情，一些我们——
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + 同位语 + where引导定语从句
sentences.analysis: 主句为all of us have done something，something like that为同位语，where引导定语从句修饰something。

topics.title: Trump attends NBA Finals
topics.content: 美国总统特朗普成为首位出席NBA总决赛的在任总统，但纽约尼克斯队输掉了比赛，球迷和评论员将其归咎于特朗普带来的“霉运”。讨论涉及体育与政治的交叉、总统出席对赛事的影响以及公众反应。
topics.keywords: Trump, NBA Finals, Knicks, jinx, sports and politics

topics.title: Sports betting and prediction markets
topics.content: NCAA因德州理工四分卫布伦丹·索斯比投注大学体育赛事而裁定其无参赛资格，但联邦法官推翻了该决定。讨论涉及体育博彩、预测市场（如Kalshi和Polymarket）的监管、内幕交易风险以及保护比赛完整性的必要性。
topics.keywords: NCAA, sports betting, prediction markets, insider trading, integrity

topics.title: Serena Williams comeback
topics.content: 44岁的塞雷娜·威廉姆斯宣布退役复出，将在女王俱乐部锦标赛中参加双打比赛。评论员猜测她可能为奥运会做准备，并讨论年龄对运动员的影响。
topics.keywords: Serena Williams, comeback, retirement, tennis, Olympics

topics.title: Maine primary election
topics.content: 缅因州初选日，民主党候选人格雷厄姆·普拉特纳面临丑闻困扰，但党内认为击败共和党参议员苏珊·柯林斯是首要任务。讨论选举策略和候选人资格。
topics.keywords: Maine primary, Graham Platner, Susan Collins, election, scandal

topics.title: Nashville data center controversy
topics.content: 纳什维尔动物园附近拟建大型数据中心，乡村歌手布拉德·佩斯利发起请愿反对，认为该项目威胁动物和城市美观。公司保证无健康风险。
topics.keywords: Nashville Zoo, data center, Brad Paisley, petition, environmental impact

topics.title: Private jet crash in Dominican Republic
topics.content: 一架私人飞机在多米尼加共和国紧急降落时起火爆炸，两名美国籍飞行员遇难，无乘客。调查正在进行中。
topics.keywords: private jet, crash, Dominican Republic, pilot, investigation

topics.title: Sam Bankman-Fried pardon request
topics.content: FTX创始人山姆·班克曼-弗里德因欺诈被判25年监禁，现正式申请总统赦免。特朗普此前表示不会赦免他。
topics.keywords: Sam Bankman-Fried, FTX, fraud, pardon, Trump

topics.title: Maine Democratic Primary and Candidate Scandal
topics.content: 缅因州民主党初选中，候选人Graham Platner面临纳粹纹身和不当行为指控，但其仍领先。前州长Janet Mills虽暂停竞选但仍出现在选票上。讨论涉及政党筛选、选民对丑闻的态度以及民主党内部策略。
topics.keywords: Maine primary, Graham Platner, Nazi tattoo, Janet Mills, Democratic Party, scandal, voter behavior

topics.title: California Election Integrity and Trump's Claims
topics.content: 加州选举因邮寄选票计票缓慢引发争议，特朗普声称选举被操纵，但无证据。共和党候选人Steve Hilton表示未发现问题。讨论涉及选举制度、选民信任以及联邦与州在选民名单管理上的冲突。
topics.keywords: California election, mail-in ballots, Trump, rigged, voter rolls, HAVA, federal vs state

topics.title: Hunter Biden's Public Comeback
topics.content: 亨特·拜登重新活跃于社交媒体，回击批评者，并接受右翼媒体采访。讨论其动机、公众形象重塑以及民主党内部对其复出的不同看法。
topics.keywords: Hunter Biden, clapback, public image, Candace Owens, Substack, Democratic reaction

topics.title: World Cup Ticket Prices and Fan Frustration
topics.content: 世界杯门票价格高昂引发球迷不满，讨论市场定价、球队管理以及球迷的应对方式。
topics.keywords: World Cup, ticket prices, fan frustration, Spurs, secondary market

topics.title: America 250 and Personal Declarations of Independence
topics.content: 美国250周年纪念，讨论历史事件如《独立宣言》的起草，以及个人如何通过撰写自己的独立宣言来庆祝。
topics.keywords: America 250, Declaration of Independence, Richard Henry Lee, Thomas Jefferson, personal declaration
